description: Fix remaining hackathon feature gaps: SSE streaming URL emission and video landing page option

userStories.title: Emit streaming_url in SSE events for Live Browser Preview
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the TinyFish agent navigating pharmacy websites in real-time via an iframe on the dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend search SSE stream emits streaming_url field when TinyFish returns a streaming URL for a pharmacy
The streaming_url is included in the same SSE event as the pharmacy result OR as a separate event type
DashboardHome.tsx already listens for event.streaming_url (lines ~404-408) — verify this path works end-to-end
LiveBrowserPreview.tsx receives and renders the streaming URLs as iframes
If no streaming URLs are available (e.g. TinyFish not returning them), the LiveBrowserPreview section is hidden gracefully
userStories.notes: Backend: check /backend/services/tinyfish.py lines 467-505 where streaming URLs are extracted. The issue is these URLs are not yielded in the SSE event generator in /backend/routers/search.py. Frontend is already wired up — DashboardHome.tsx listens for streaming_url and LiveBrowserPreview.tsx renders iframes. This is purely a backend plumbing fix.

userStories.title: Add ocean video as optional landing page background behind Aurora
userStories.description: As a user, I want the landing page hero to optionally show an ocean video background for maximum visual impact at the hackathon demo.
acceptanceCriteria: The video file at /frontend/src/Drone_Ocean_Footage_Generation.mp4 is used as a background video in the hero section
Video plays behind the Aurora canvas effect as a layered background (video underneath, Aurora on top with reduced opacity)
Video is muted, autoplay, loop, playsInline
If video fails to load, Aurora canvas still works as fallback
Hero text and CTA buttons remain readable over the combined background
No layout shift or flash of unstyled content on page load
userStories.notes: Fixed: video file was in src/ but referenced as /ocean-bg.mp4 (public/). Copied to public/ocean-bg.mp4. Video element + CSS already existed in page.tsx. Aurora canvas component is at src/components/ui/aurora.tsx. Landing page is at src/app/page.tsx. Layer the video underneath the Aurora with the Aurora having some transparency so both are visible — the Aurora adds the bioluminescent shimmer on top of the ocean footage.
